reason: SAD.md is comprehensive and contract-compliant: every FR (01-05) maps to ≥1 module with primary/supporting roles (SAD §2.3 lines 103-109), all 6 NFRs (performance/security/reliability/maintainability/deployability) are addressed with explicit owner modules and verification mechanisms (SAD §2.4 / §4), the dependency graph is a strict DAG with no cycles (SAD §2.6 lines 215-223 — matches SPEC.md §6 verbatim), data flow diagrams (submit/run flows in §3.2 / §3.3, system data flow in §3.4) are internally consistent, directory structure follows CRG community-boundary principles (single prod community src/taskq/ + single test community tests/, ≤15 files each per §2.2 / §2.8), verify-system target exists at Makefile:20 chaining test→shell-audit→smoke, the SAB block in §5 contains all required field
